cards.name: Blue-eyes White Dragon
cards.description:
An extremely rare   
card with
unsurpassed attack
and defense power.

cards.name: Mystical Elf
cards.description:
A delicate elf that 
lacks in offense
but has a terrific
defense backed by
mystical power.

cards.name: Hitotsu-me Giant
cards.description:
A one-eyed behemoth 
with thick, powerful
arms made for
delivering punishing
blows.

cards.name: Baby Dragon
cards.description:
Much more than just 
a child, this dragon
is gifted with
untapped power.

cards.name: Ryu-kishin
cards.description:
A very elusive 
creature that looks 
like a harmless
statue until it
attacks.

cards.name: Feral Imp
cards.description:
A playful little 
imp that lurks in 
the dark, waiting to
attack an unwary
enemy.

cards.name: Winged Dragon #1
cards.description:
A dragon commonly 
found guarding 
mountain fortresses.
Its signature attack
is a sweeping dive 
from out of the blue.

cards.name: Mushroom Man
cards.description:
Found in moist
areas, this monster 
launches poison
spores against its
enemies.

cards.name: Shadow Specter
cards.description:
Ghostly beast that 
appears in the
wasteland and is
particularly
troublesome when
faced in large
numbers.

cards.name: Blackland Fire Dragon
cards.description:
A dragon that dwells
in the depths of
darkness. Its
defensive capability
suffers from its
poor eyesight.

cards.name: Sword Arm of Dragon
cards.description:
With a body covered 
in sword-like
thorns, nothing
dares stand in the
way of this monster 
when it charges.

cards.name: Swamp Battleguard
cards.description:
This creature is    
armed with a spiked 
club that can
destroy almost
anything in its path.
Rumored to have a
brother that is just
as destructive.

cards.name: Tyhone
cards.description:
Capable of firing
cannonballs from its
mouth for long-range
attacks against
enemies.

cards.name: Battle Steer
cards.description:
A bull monster often
found in the woods.
Charges enemy
monsters with a pair
of razor-sharp horns.

cards.name: Flame Swordsman
cards.description:
A fighter gifted
with the power of
fire.
Attacks enemies with
a sword that
launches flames.

cards.name: Time Wizard
cards.description:
A sorcerer capable
of bending time to
his will. Though not
powerful at first
glance, appearances 
can be deceiving.

cards.name: Right Leg of the Forbidden One
cards.description:
A forbidden limb
sealed by magic.
Whoever breaks
this seal will know
infinite power.
Only one card of
this type may be
included in a deck.

cards.name: Left Leg of the Forbidden One
cards.description:
A forbidden limb
sealed by magic.
Whoever breaks
this seal will know
infinite power.
Only one card of
this type may be
included in a deck.

cards.name: Right Arm of the Forbidden One
cards.description:
A forbidden limb
sealed by magic.
Whoever breaks
this seal will know
infinite power.
Only one card of
this type may be
included in a deck.

cards.name: Left Arm of the Forbidden One
cards.description:
A forbidden limb
sealed by magic.
Whoever breaks
this seal will know
infinite power.
Only one card of
this type may be
included in a deck.

cards.name: Exodia the Forbidden
cards.description:
Once combined with
arms and legs, this 
monster is freed
from its magical
chains.
Only one card of
this type may be
included in a deck.

cards.name: Summoned Skull
cards.description:
An entity with dark
powers for confusing
the enemy. Among the
FIEND class of
monsters, this is a 
pretty rare card.

cards.name: The Wicked Worm Beast
cards.description:
A monster worm
created by the
powers of darkness. 
It suddenly appears 
from under the
ground to attack its
enemies.

cards.name: Skull Servant
cards.description:
A skeletal ghost
that isn't strong
but can mean trouble
in large numbers.

cards.name: Horn Imp
cards.description:
A small imp that
dwells in the dark.
Its single horn
makes it a
formidable opponent.

cards.name: Battle Ox
cards.description:
A monster with
tremendous power.
Destroys enemies
with a swing of its
axe.

cards.name: Beaver Warrior
cards.description:
What this creature 
lacks in size,
it makes up for
in defense when
battling in the
meadow.

cards.name: Rock Ogre Grotto #1
cards.description:
Protected by a solid
body of rock, this
creature throws
a bone-shattering
punch.

cards.name: Mountain Warrior
cards.description:
A solid warrior that
can move swiftly
over rough terrain.

cards.name: Zombie Warrior
cards.description:
A deceptively
fragile-looking
skeleton warrior
that is known for
its swift and
precise attacks.

cards.name: Koumori Dragon
cards.description:
A vicious,
fire-breathing
dragon whose wicked
flames corrupt the
souls of its victims.

cards.name: Two-headed King Rex
cards.description:
An unusual and
rarely seen
two-headed dragon.

cards.name: Judge Man
cards.description:
For this
club-wielding
warrior, there is
no other outcome
to battle than
victory or defeat.

cards.name: Saggi the Dark Clown
cards.description:
This clown appears 
out of nowhere and 
executes some very 
strange moves to 
avoid enemy attacks.

cards.name: Dark Magician
cards.description:
The ultimate wizard 
in terms of attack
and defense.

cards.name: The Snake Hair
cards.description:
A monster with the
head of a poisonus
snake. One look will
turn an unwary
opponent to stone.

cards.name: Gaia the Dragon Champion
cards.description:
A warrior's prowess 
combines with a
dragon's speed to
create a powerful
offensive force.

cards.name: Gaia the Fierce Knight
cards.description:
A knight mounted on 
a horse that travels
faster than the wind.
His battle charge is
a force to be
reckoned with.

cards.name: Curse of Dragon
cards.description:
A wicked dragon that
taps dark forces to 
execute a powerful
attack.

cards.name: Dragon Piper
cards.description:
A jar carved with
strange patterns. It
has a particularly
high defense factor.

cards.name: Celtic Guardian
cards.description:
An elf, who learned
to wield a sword,
baffles enemies with
lightning-swift
attacks.

cards.name: Illusionist Faceless Mage
cards.description:
Manipulates enemy
attacks with the
power of illusion.
A very rare card.

cards.name: Karbonala Warrior
cards.description:
A very
average-looking
fighter with an
unusually high
attack factor.

cards.name: Rogue Doll
cards.description:
A unique doll gifted
with mystical power.
Particularly
powerful when
attacking against
dark forces.

cards.name: Oscillo Hero #2
cards.description:
Attacks its enemies
with thunder.

cards.name: Griffore
cards.description:
This creature's
tough hide deflects
just about any
attack.

cards.name: Torike
cards.description:
Not as tough as it
looks in terms of
defense.
This monster's
sharp horn gives it
an edge
when attacking.

cards.name: Sangan
cards.description:
A compact,
three-eyed monster
that is dangerous
when faced
in the dark.

cards.name: Big Insect
cards.description:
A giant ant that
dwells in the jungle.
Powerful in terms of
both ATK and DEF
factors.

cards.name: Basic Insect
cards.description:
Usually found
travelling in swarms,
this creature's
ideal environment is
the forest.

cards.name: Armored Lizard
cards.description:
A lizard with a very
tough hide and a
very vicious bite.

cards.name: Hercules Beetle
cards.description:
A massive beetle
with a tough hide
and a dangerous horn.

cards.name: Killer Needle
cards.description:
A huge bee with
exceptional strength.
Particularly
dangerous when a
swarm is encountered.

cards.name: Gokibore
cards.description:
A large, spherical
roach that attacks
its enemies by
rolling over them.
Its tough defense
makes it 
a formidable foe.

cards.name: Giant Flea
cards.description:
A giant
blood-sucking flea
that's devastating
when attacking.

cards.name: Larvae Moth
cards.description:
Not much in its
larval form,
this creature is a
force to be reckoned
with when it grows
to become a colossal
moth.

cards.name: Great Moth
cards.description:
A powerful creature
of the forest, this
huge moth attacks
its enemies by
spreading poison
dust with its wings.

cards.name: Kuriboh
cards.description:
By itself, this
small creature may
not seem like much.
But in the dark, it
attacks in numbers
as a formidable
force.

cards.name: Mammoth Graveyard
cards.description:
A mammoth that
protects the
gravesite of its
pack. It's
absolutely merciless
when facing
graverobbers.

cards.name: Great White
cards.description:
A giant white shark
with razor-sharp
teeth.

cards.name: Wolf
cards.description:
A rarely seen wolf
with a powerful nose
for catching the
scent of an enemy.

cards.name: Harpie Lady
cards.description:
A human-shaped
animal with wings.
Beautiful to watch,
but lethal when
engaged in battle.

cards.name: Harpie Lady Sisters
cards.description:
Three fierce sisters
who relentlessly
attack as a team.

cards.name: Tiger Axe
cards.description:
A fast and powerful
axe-wielding
beast warrior.

cards.name: Silver Fang
cards.description:
A snow wolf that's
beautiful to the eye
but absolutely
vicious in battle.

cards.name: Kojikocy
cards.description:
A man-hunter with
powerful arms that
can crush boulders.

cards.name: Perfectly Ultimate Great Moth
cards.description:
The final
incarnation of the
ultimate insect,
the Great Moth!

cards.name: Garoozis
cards.description:
An axe-swinging
beast warrior with
the head of
a dragon.

cards.name: Thousand Dragon
cards.description:
A dragon that has
grown and developed
over a thousand
years.

cards.name: Fiend Kraken
cards.description:
A massive squid that
suddenly appears
from the depths of
the sea to attack
unwary enemies.

cards.name: Jellyfish
cards.description:
An almost invisible,
semi-transparent
jellyfish that
drifts in the sea.

cards.name: Cocoon of Evolution
cards.description:
This creature is
capable of instantly
evolving larvae
into adults.

cards.name: Kairyu-shin
cards.description:
A sea dragon that's
referred to as the
"King of the Ocean".
It attacks its
enemies with huge
tidal waves.

cards.name: Giant Soldier of Stone
cards.description:
A giant warrior made
of stone. A punch
from this creature
has earth-shaking
results.

cards.name: Man-eating Plant
cards.description:
A meat-eating plant
that is attractive
to the eye but
dangerous when
approached.

cards.name: Krokodilus
cards.description:
A vicious crocodile
with intelligence.
Hard scales form
a natural armor
for this creature.

cards.name: Grappler
cards.description:
A devious snake with
a thick body that
wraps around an
enemy monster and
squeezes the life
out of it.

cards.name: Axe Raider
cards.description:
An axe-wielding
monster of
tremendous strength
and agility.

cards.name: Megazowler
cards.description:
Nothing stands in
the way of this
spike-covered
dinosaur.

cards.name: Uraby
cards.description:
Fast on its feet,
this dinosaur rips
enemies to shreds
with its sharp claws.

cards.name: Crawling Dragon #2
cards.description:
A powerful dragon
with teeth that can
grind almost
anything to dust.

cards.name: Red-eyes B. Dragon
cards.description:
A very rare card
with a high-level
ATK factor.

cards.name: Castle of Dark Illusions
cards.description:
A creature that can
generate darkness to
envelop all that
exists around it.

cards.name: Reaper of the Cards
cards.description:
This monster boasts
a strong defense and
a massive scythe
that cuts through
almost anything.

cards.name: King of Yamimakai
cards.description:
Wields the power of
darkness to destroy
its enemies.

cards.name: Barox
cards.description:
This creature flies
through the dark,
attacking its
enemies with its
long, hairy arms.

cards.name: Dark Chimera
cards.description:
A fire-breathing
monster that dwells
in the netherworld.

cards.name: Metal Guardian
cards.description:
A fiend guarding
the treasures of
the netherworld.
Its defense is
particularly high in
 a dark environment.

cards.name: Catapult Turtle
cards.description:
Well-protected by
its shell, this
monster flings
projectiles from
its catapult.

cards.name: Gyakutenno Megami
cards.description:
Uses her mystical
power to protect the
weak and provide
spiritual support.

cards.name: Mystic Horseman
cards.description:
Half man and half
horse, this monster
is known for its
extreme speed.

cards.name: Rabid Horseman
cards.description:
A powerful
and unstoppable
combination of
bull and horse.

cards.name: Zanki
cards.description:
Prefers to face
enemies one-on-one.
His swiftly drawn
blade delivers a
quick and immediate
finnish.

cards.name: Crawling Dragon
cards.description:
A weakened dragon
that can no longer
fly, but is still a
formidable force
to be reckoned with.

cards.name: Crass Clown
cards.description:
A performer
in the Dark Circus,
this clown drains
the strength of
its enemies with
strange dances.

cards.name: Armored Zombie
cards.description:
A warrior raised
from the beyond.
Blindly swings
a sharp blade with
devastating force.

cards.name: Dragon Zombie
cards.description:
A dragon revived by
sorcery. Its breath
is highly corrosive.

cards.name: Clown Zombie
cards.description:
A clown revived by
the powers of
darkness.
Its strange dance
has sent many 
monsters to their
ends.

cards.name: Pumpking the King of Ghosts
cards.description:
This pumpkin king
strikes at its
enemies with its
long tentacles.

cards.name: Battle Warrior
cards.description:
A warrior that
fights with his
bare hands.

cards.name: Wings of Wicked Flame
cards.description:
Soaring over
its enemies on wings
of crimson fire,
this monster attacks
by blasting flames
from its body.

cards.name: Mask of Darkness
cards.description:
A shadow mask
created by the hands
of a dark mage.

cards.name: Job-change Mirror
cards.description:
An indestructible,
wicked mirror that
blocks enemy attacks.

cards.name: Curtain of the Dark Ones
cards.description:
A curtain woven by
the hands of a
sorcerer. It is said
to enhance the power
of magic- users.

cards.name: Tomozaurus
cards.description:
A deceivingly small
creature that is so
vicious it attacks
both friend and foe
without discretion.

cards.name: Spirit of the Winds
cards.description:
A spirit of the wind
that freely sails
the skies. Known to
generate storms when
it's in a bad mood.

cards.name: Kageningen
cards.description:
Uses both its
physical and shadow
forms to attack,
making it
a difficult creature
to overcome.

cards.name: Graveyard and the Hand of Invitation
cards.description:
A final resting
place that enhances
the power of the
doomed and drains
that of the living.

cards.name: Goddess with the Third Eye
cards.description:
A goddess with an
all-seeing eye that
reveals all.

cards.name: Hero of the East
cards.description:
A samurai from the
Far East armed with
a razor-sharp sword.

cards.name: Doma The Angel of Silence
cards.description:
This angel rules
over the doomed
and administers it
when necessary.

cards.name: That Which Feeds on Life
cards.description:
A vile monster that
fuels its power by
draining the essence
of life from
its opponents.

cards.name: Dark Gray
cards.description:
Entirely gray,
this beast has
rarely been seen
by mortal eyes.

cards.name: White Magical Hat
cards.description:
A gentleman thief
that eludes the law
despite the fact
that he sticks out
like a sore thumb
with his silk hat
and white cape.

cards.name: Kamion Wizard
cards.description:
A magic-user that
controls chaos
and wields
a mighty sickle.

cards.name: Nightmare Scorpion
cards.description:
A very toxic
creature that
induces nightmares
and attacks its
victims with four
poison- tipped
stingers.

cards.name: Spirit of the Books
cards.description:
A spirit of the
books with infinite
knowledge and
an endless variety
of attack strategies.

cards.name: Supporter in the Shadows
cards.description:
A cute elf that
assists against
enemies while
remaining hidden
from sight.

cards.name: Trial of Nightmares
cards.description:
Passes judgment on
enemies that are
locked in coffins.

cards.name: Dream Clown
cards.description:
The mysterious dance
of this creature
draws its enemies
into eternal slumber.

cards.name: Sleeping Lion
cards.description:
Frequently
found sleeping,
this monster is
very dangerous
when awakened.

cards.name: Yamatano Dragon Scroll
cards.description:
This dragon is
conjured from
a picture scroll
to attack enemies.
It has a pretty
low defense factor.

cards.name: Dark Plant
cards.description:
A vicious flower
raised from polluted
soil and fertilized
by dark forces.

cards.name: Ancient Tool
cards.description:
An engine
of destruction
discovered in the
ruins of an ancient
civilization.

cards.name: Faith Bird
cards.description:
A bird with a very
long tail that
attacks with a light
that emanates from
its entire being.

cards.name: Orion the Battle King
cards.description:
A mysterious
creature known as
the king of warriors,
but nobody has lived
long enough to tell
how it earned
its reputation.

cards.name: Ansatsu
cards.description:
A silent and swift
warrior specializing
in sneak attack.

cards.name: LaMoon
cards.description:
A sorcerer who lives
on the moon and
attacks opponents
with the power
of lunar light.

cards.name: Nemuriko
cards.description:
A child-like
creature that
controls a sleep
spirit to beckon
enemies into eternal
slumber.

cards.name: Weather Control
cards.description:
This monster is
capable of
manipulating the
weather. This power
is the reason behind
the changing climate
of mountains.

cards.name: Octoberser
cards.description:
A strange creature
with the head
of a fish and
the tentacles of
an octopus that
attacks its enemies
with spears.

cards.name: The 13th Grave
cards.description:
A zombie that
suddenly appeared
from plot
#13 - supposedly
an empty grave.

cards.name: Charubin the Fire Knight
cards.description:
A warrior protected
by a shell
that can even
deflect the heat
of burning flames.

cards.name: Mystical Capture Chain
cards.description:
A mystical chain
that is believed
capable of binding
its enemies and
preventing their
attacks.

cards.name: Fiend's Hand
cards.description:
Long arms reach out
from the Swamp
of Chaos to drag
in enemy creatures.

cards.name: Witty Phantom
cards.description:
Dressed in a
night-black tuxedo,
this creature
presides over
the doomed.

cards.name: Mystery Hand
cards.description:
Twisting the fabric
of reality, arms
stretch out from
another dimension
to attack opponents.

cards.name: Dragon Statue
cards.description:
A granite warrior
with a dragon's soul
wields a powerful
sword against
all enemies.

cards.name: Blue-eyed Silver Zombie
cards.description:
A creature rumored
to turn enemies
into zombies
with a strange ray
that emanates
from its eyes.

cards.name: Toad Master
cards.description:
Thousands of years
old, this frog
wizard attacks
enemies with an
army of tadpoles.

cards.name: Spiked Snail
cards.description:
Evolving from the
powers of darkness,
this snail has arms
and legs that allow
swift attacks
against its enemies.

cards.name: Flame Manipulator
cards.description:
Attacks enemies with
fire-related spells,
such as the
"Sea of Flames"
and the
"Wall of Fire".

cards.name: Necrolancer the Timelord
cards.description:
The first in a line
of golems that
appears almost
anywhere from within
a dimensional ring.

cards.name: Djinn the Watcher of the Wind
cards.description:
Controls the air
currents to create
violent winds and
tornadoes to blow
away its enemies.

cards.name: The Bewitching Phantom Thief
cards.description:
A flashy,
black-caped thief
who wields
a magic cane.

cards.name: Temple of Skulls
cards.description:
A weird temple
of skulls and bones
that sucks the
living essence
of all those who
dare approach it.

cards.name: Monster Egg
cards.description:
A warrior hidden
within an egg that
attacks enemies by
flinging eggshells.

cards.name: The Shadow Who Controls the Dark
cards.description:
A living shadow
that dwells in the
realm of darkness.
It paralyzes
its enemies
to prevent attacks.

cards.name: Lord of the Lamp
cards.description:
A giant that appears
from a mystic lamp
and follows
the orders
of the lamp's owner.

cards.name: Akihiron
cards.description:
A mysterious
creature that dwells
below the sea.

cards.name: Rhaimundos of the Red Sword
cards.description:
A warrior armed
with the Sword
of Crimson Flames.
Uses fire to bind
the movement
of its enemies.

cards.name: The Melting Red Shadow
cards.description:
A creature that
melts into the earth,
melds with an
opponent's shadow,
and attacks
from below.

cards.name: Dokuroizo the Grim Reaper
cards.description:
A living spirit that
preys on the living
essence of enemies.

cards.name: Fire Reaper
cards.description:
A creature that
deals out punishment
with its
flaming arrows.

cards.name: Larvas
cards.description:
A fast-moving,
bird-like creature
that strangles an
opposing monster
with its long,
thin arms.

cards.name: Hard Armor
cards.description:
A living suit of
armor that attacks
enemies with a
bone-jarring tackle.

cards.name: Firegrass
cards.description:
A fire-breathing
plant found growing
near volcanoes.

cards.name: Man Eater
cards.description:
Man-eating plant
with poison feelers
for attacking
enemies.

cards.name: Dig Beak
cards.description:
Coiling its
serpent-like body,
this creature spins
and attacks with
its snapping beak.

cards.name: M-warrior #1
cards.description:
Specializing in
combination attacks,
this warrior uses
magnetism to block
an enemy's escape.

cards.name: M-warrior #2
cards.description:
Specializing in
combination attacks,
this warrior is
equipped with a
tough, magnetically
coated armor.

cards.name: Tainted Wisdom
cards.description:
A parasite brain
that preys
on the knowledge
and intelligence
of its opponents.

cards.name: Lisark
cards.description:
An unusual creature
with sapphire eyes
that creates visions
to confuse the enemy.

cards.name: Lord of Zemia
cards.description:
A vile entity that
deceives enemies
into walking a path
of destruction.

cards.name: The Judgement Hand
cards.description:
The hand of final
judgment is capable
of intense attacks
against the enemy.

cards.name: Mysterious Puppeteer
cards.description:
A puppet master that
manipulates enemies
during battle.

cards.name: Ancient Jar
cards.description:
A fragile jar from
the past containing
a mysterious
creature.

cards.name: Darkfire Dragon
cards.description:
Scorching flames
that wipe out
enemies in the blink
of an eye.

cards.name: Dark King of the Abyss
cards.description:
King of the
netherworld. It's
said that he once
had the power to
rule over the Dark.

cards.name: Spirit of the Harp
cards.description:
A spirit that
soothes the soul
with the music of
its glorious harp.

cards.name: Big Eye
cards.description:
This creature is
covered with
hypnotic eyes
for mesmerizing
its enemies.

cards.name: Armaill
cards.description:
A strange warrior
who manipulates
three fearsome
blades with
both hands and
its tail.

cards.name: Dark Prisoner
cards.description:
This creature
manipulates light
to eliminate
all traces of
its appearance.

cards.name: Hurricail
cards.description:
A twister
that runs rampant
in the wastelands,
cutting its enemies
with blades of wind.

cards.name: Ancient Brain
cards.description:
Exiled from reality,
this creature is
adept at fighting
in the dark.

cards.name: Fire Eye
cards.description:
A winged eye
enveloped in flames
that attacks enemies
with fire.

cards.name: Monsturtle
cards.description:
A vicious turtle
with a spiked shell.

cards.name: Claw Reacher
cards.description:
Stretching arms and
razor-sharp claws
make this monster a
formidable opponent.

cards.name: Phantom Dewan
cards.description:
A wizard
that freezes an
enemy's movement 
with a single curse.

cards.name: Arlownay
cards.description:
A maiden
in the flower
blossoms spreads
poisonous pollen
against opponents.

cards.name: Dark Shade
cards.description:
Emits a dazzling
light from its
crystal to blind
its enemies.

cards.name: Masked Clown
cards.description:
A dancing warrior
that makes mincemeat
out of opponents
with a sharp scythe.

cards.name: Lucky Trinket
cards.description:
A thin and reedy
creature protected
by sacred power.

cards.name: Genin
cards.description:
Uses amazing
sleight-of-hand
to fool and destroy
its enemies.

cards.name: Eyearmor
cards.description:
This warrior
confuses and
destroys enemies
by adopting
their images.

cards.name: Fiend Refrection #2
cards.description:
A bird-beast
that summons
reinforcements
with a hand mirror.

cards.name: Gate Deeg
cards.description:
A creature
with an abdominal
portal used for
summoning monsters
from the netherworld.

cards.name: Synchar
cards.description:
An ugly creature
with two heads and a
mouth for blasting
laser beams.

cards.name: Fusionist
cards.description:
A monstrous cat with
wings and a long,
striking tail.

cards.name: Akakieisu
cards.description:
A wizard
whose incantations
numb the senses of
opposing monsters.

cards.name: LaLa Li-oon
cards.description:
Protected by thunder,
this dangerous cloud
attacks its enemies
with acid rain.

cards.name: Key Mace
cards.description:
A small angel
whose cuteness
melts the hearts
of its enemies.

cards.name: Turtle Tiger
cards.description:
A tiger encased in a
protective shell
that attacks its
enemies with its
razor-sharp fangs.

cards.name: Terra the Terrible
cards.description:
Know as a dweller
of the swamps,
this creature is a
minion of the Dark
forces.

cards.name: Doron
cards.description:
An unpredictable
creature that splits
into two and attacks
an enemy from
opposite directions.

cards.name: Arma Knight
cards.description:
An ammonite warrior
that has protected
the seas from the
dawn of time.

cards.name: Mech Mole Zombie
cards.description:
A creature of the
night that attacks
enemies with its 
rocket-powered arms.

cards.name: Happy Lover
cards.description:
A little angel
that fires beams
of happiness
from the heart jewel
on its forehead.

cards.name: Penguin Knight
cards.description:
A penguin-like
creature that slides
on its belly
to deliver a blow
with its
outstretched sword.

cards.name: Petit Dragon
cards.description:
A very small dragon
known for its
vicious attacks.

cards.name: Frenzied Panda
cards.description:
A savage beast
that carries
a big bamboo stick
for beating down
its enemies.

cards.name: Air Marmot of Nefariousness
cards.description:
A horned beaver
with wings that
throws high-velocity
acorns from the
sky with uncanny
accuracy.

cards.name: Phantom Ghost
cards.description:
Malicious spirits
that walk the world
of the living,
unable to find their
final resting place.

cards.name: Mabarrel
cards.description:
A cannon-like
monster that rapidly
fires eyeballs
at the enemy.

cards.name: Dorover
cards.description:
An ugly, melting
creature that
breathes out
poison gas.

cards.name: Twin Long Rods #1
cards.description:
This creature swings
its whip-like arms
for mid-range
attacks against
enemies.

cards.name: Droll Bird
cards.description:
With a battle cry
that curdles
the blood of
its opponent,
this creature
attacks with its
massive beak.

cards.name: Petit Angel
cards.description:
A quick-moving and
tiny angel that's
very difficult
to hit.

cards.name: Winged Cleaver
cards.description:
This creature
attacks by swinging
around its
sickle-like arms.

cards.name: Hinotama Soul
cards.description:
An intensely hot
flame creature that
rams anything that
stands in its way.

cards.name: Kaminarikozou
cards.description:
This creature stores
lightning within its
body to deliver
electrifying attacks.

cards.name: Meotoko
cards.description:
A huge monster with
a single eye that
fires an intence
beam.

cards.name: Aqua Madoor
cards.description:
A wizard of the
waters that conjures
a liquid wall to
crush any enemies
that oppose him.

cards.name: Kagemusha of the Blue Flame
cards.description:
Serves as a double
for the ruler of the
Blue Flame. A master
swordsman that
wields a fine blade.

cards.name: Flame Ghost
cards.description:
A fiery spirit
that burns anything
in its path.

cards.name: Dryad
cards.description:
A spirit of the
forest protected by
the surrounding
plant life.

cards.name: B. Skull Dragon
cards.description:
A very rare creature
created from the
fusion of an
uncommon beast and
a vicious dragon.

cards.name: Two-mouth Darkruler
cards.description:
A dinosaur with two
crushing jaws.
Stores electricity
in its horn and
releases high
voltage bolts
from the mouth
on its back.

cards.name: Solitude
cards.description:
A beast-warrior that
swings a massive
scythe that draws on
the spirit of its
enemies to deliver
devastating blows.

cards.name: Masked Sorcerer
cards.description:
A mysterious wizard
whose face remains
forever hidden
behind a strange
mask.

cards.name: Kumootoko
cards.description:
A massive,
intelligent spider
that traps its
enemies with webbing.

cards.name: Midnight Fiend
cards.description:
A winged creature
rumored to appear
at midnight.

cards.name: Roaring Ocean Snake
cards.description:
A massive
sea serpent that
creates tidal waves
to wipe out
its enemies.

cards.name: Trap Master
cards.description:
A warrior that
excels in laying
traps such as a
bottomless pit, for
eternally ensnaring
opponents.

cards.name: Fiend Sword
cards.description:
Few have escaped
the curse of this
creature. Those that
have done so have
gained untold power.

cards.name: Skull Stalker
cards.description:
Swift and vicious,
this monster grabs
its victim with its
pincers and attacks
the captive with its
poison stinger.

cards.name: Hitodenchak
cards.description:
A vicious starfish
that spits acid
to melt away
its enemies.

cards.name: Wood Remains
cards.description:
A zombie that rose
from the remains of
the woodland ruler.

cards.name: Hourglass of Life
cards.description:
A creature
that allows power
to be gained
at the cost of life.

cards.name: Rare Fish
cards.description:
An unusual and
ferocious fish with
the head of a beast.

cards.name: Wood Clown
cards.description:
An unpleasantly
smiling creature
that wields a scythe
to avoid enemy blows.

cards.name: Madjinn Gunn
cards.description:
A living weapon that
fires projectiles
from its mouth.

cards.name: Dark Titan of Terror
cards.description:
A spirit said to
dwell in the world
of dreams.
Attacks enemies
in their sleep.

cards.name: Beautiful Headhuntress
cards.description:
A lovely swordmaster
with some very
agile moves.

cards.name: Wodan the Resident of the Forest
cards.description:
A warrior that has
long resided in the
forest and enjoys
the protection
of Mother Nature.

cards.name: Guardian of the Labyrinth
cards.description:
A warrior that
guards the entrance
to the netherworld.

cards.name: Haniwa
cards.description:
An earthen doll
that protects
the treasure
in the tombs
of ancient kings.

cards.name: Yashinoki
cards.description:
A palm tree with a
will of its own that
attacks enemies by
flinging coconuts.

cards.name: Vishwar Randi
cards.description:
A woman warrior that
serves the forces
of darkness.

cards.name: The Drdek
cards.description:
An eyeball creature
with legs for
jumping high and
delivering finishing
blows with its sharp
claws.

cards.name: Dark Assailant
cards.description:
Armed with Psycho
Sword, this sinister
cutthroat rules the
outer land.

cards.name: Candle of Fate
cards.description:
An opponent's fate
is decided
when the flames
of each finger
are extinguished.

cards.name: Water Element
cards.description:
A water spirit
that envelops
its opponent
in a thick fog
to cover its attack.

cards.name: Dissolverock
cards.description:
A monster borne from
the lava pits.
Generates intensive
heat that can melt
away its enemies.

cards.name: Meda Bat
cards.description:
An eyeball fiend
created by a servant
of darkness.
Uses "Dark Spheres"
to blow away
its enemies.

cards.name: One Who Hunts Souls
cards.description:
A creature
with a sword
that gains its power
from the life forces
of its victims.

cards.name: Root Water
cards.description:
An amphibian capable
of calling up a
massive tidal wave
from the dark seas
to wipe out enemy
monsters.

cards.name: Master & Expert
cards.description:
A fearsome duo
consisting of a
beast master and
its loyal servant.

cards.name: Water Omotics
cards.description:
Transforms the water
overflowing from a
jar into attacking
dragons.

cards.name: Hyo
cards.description:
An ice warrior whose
slightest touch
freezes an opponent.

cards.name: Enchanting Mermaid
cards.description:
A beautiful mermaid
that lures voyagers
to a watery grave.

cards.name: Nekogal #1
cards.description:
A cat creature that
looks cute to the
eye but delivers
scratching blows
with its sharp claws.

cards.name: Angelwitch
cards.description:
A creature
that chose the
path of sorcery
to become a witch.

cards.name: Embryonic Beast
cards.description:
A repulsive monster
with a gaping belly
that swallows almost
anything.

cards.name: Prevent Rat
cards.description:
This monster is
shielded by 
a hide covered
in thick hair.

cards.name: Dimensional Warrior
cards.description:
A monster
capable of creating
dimensional rifts
to trap its enemies.

cards.name: Stone Armadiller
cards.description:
With a body armored
by rock-hard fur,
this monster
features excellent
defense capabilities.

cards.name: Beastking of the Swamps
cards.description:
This creature
changes the ground
at its feet into
quicksand to ensnare
its enemies.

cards.name: Ancient Sorcerer
cards.description:
A master fighter
that uses various
staffs to render
enemies unconscious.

cards.name: Lunar Queen Elzaim
cards.description:
A lovely
moon goddess that
can throw up
a lunar curtain
to block
enemy attacks.

cards.name: Wicked Mirror
cards.description:
A malevolent mirror
that hypnotizes
a beholder and
renders the victim
susceptible
to attacks.

cards.name: The Little Swordsman of Aile
cards.description:
An elf warrior
mounted on a huge
lizard.

cards.name: Rock Ogre Grotto #2
cards.description:
A stone golem
that turns opponents
into rocks and
crushes them to dust.

cards.name: Wing Egg Elf
cards.description:
Hiding within its
eggshell, this
creature blocks
enemy attacks with
its massive wings.

cards.name: The Furious Sea King
cards.description:
Grand King of the
Seven Seas.
Able to summon
massive tidal waves
to drown the enemy.

cards.name: Princess of Tsurugi
cards.description:
A queen of swords
that is virtually
unequalled in her
mastery of every
blade imaginable
to man.

cards.name: Unknown Warrior of Fiend
cards.description:
The speed of this
warrior creates
an intense vacuum
that can actually
slice through
a monster's hide.

cards.name: Sectarian of Secrets
cards.description:
A sorcerer that
worships the dark
forces and can
summon a massive
hand to drag away
opponents into
the netherworld.

cards.name: Versago the Destroyer
cards.description:
A lord of
destruction
born from the heart
of darkness,
this creature
can summon storms
to destroy opponents.

cards.name: Wetha
cards.description:
A rain spirit that
can summon typhoons
to blow away its
enemies.

cards.name: Megirus Light
cards.description:
This creature's
ominous eyes can
unleash piercing
rays against its
enemies.

cards.name: Mavelus
cards.description:
Related to the
phoenix, this
creature dwells in
the mountains. Its
fiery breath is
extremely scorching.

cards.name: Ancient Tree of Enlightenment
cards.description:
Armed with a wealth
of knowledge, this
monster is able to
block just about
any attack.

cards.name: Green Phantom King
cards.description:
This youthful king
of the forests lives
in a green world,
abundant with trees
and wildlife.

cards.name: Ground Attacker Bugroth
cards.description:
A land-based armored
robot that is said
to once have marine
attack capabilities.

cards.name: Ray & Temperature
cards.description:
The Sun and the
North Wind join
hands to deliver
a devastating
combination of heat
and gale-force winds.

cards.name: Gorgon Egg
cards.description:
A gorgon's egg with
eyes said to create
whatever creature
crosses its view.

cards.name: Petit Moth
cards.description:
Nobody has any idea
what creature may
spawn from this
mysterious larva.

cards.name: King Fog
cards.description:
A spectre that
dwells in a blinding
curtain of smoke.

cards.name: Protector of the Throne
cards.description:
A creature that
protects the king's
throne from usurpers.

cards.name: Mystic Clown
cards.description:
Nothing can stop the
mad attack of this
powerful creature.

cards.name: Mystical Sheep #2
cards.description:
A monstrous sheep
with a long tail for
hypnotizing enemies
to render them
powerless.

cards.name: Holograh
cards.description:
A monster machine
that generates
images to confuse
its enemies,
making them prone
to attacks.

cards.name: Tao the Chanter
cards.description:
A magic-user that
corrodes the yin
and yang to create
a twisted power
to attack enemies.

cards.name: Serpent Marauder
cards.description:
A snake with a
single eye that
blows an icy breath
to freeze its
opponents.

cards.name: Gatekeeper
cards.description:
An indestructible
machine
built to protect
key entrances.

cards.name: Ogre of the Black Shadow
cards.description:
An ogre possessed
by the powers
of the dark.
Few can withstand
its rapid charge.

cards.name: Dark Artist
cards.description:
A demented artist
that creates
objets d'art
to crush enemies.

cards.name: Change Slime
cards.description:
A shape-shifting
slime that is
capable of adopting
the form of other
creatures.

cards.name: Moon Envoy
cards.description:
A servant of the
moon goddess,
this warrior
wields a pike
with a spectacular
crescent-shaped
blade.

cards.name: Fireyarou
cards.description:
A malevolent
creature
wrapped in flames
that attacks enemies
with intense fire.

cards.name: Psychic Kappa
cards.description:
An amphibian with
extrasensory powers
for blocking attacks.

cards.name: Masaki the Legendary Swordsman
cards.description:
Legendary
swordmaster and a
veteran of over 100
battles.

cards.name: Dragoness the Wicked Knight
cards.description:
A warrior
equipped with
equipment fashioned
from dragon scales.

cards.name: Bio Plant
cards.description:
A monstrous creature
born from a failed
lab experiment.

cards.name: One-eyed Shield Dragon
cards.description:
This dragon wears a
shield not only for
its own protection
but also for ramming
its enemies.

cards.name: Cyber Soldier of Darkworld
cards.description:
An unstoppable
mechanical soldier
powered by dark
forces.

cards.name: Wicked Dragon with the Ersatz Head
cards.description:
A two-headed dragon
with a pair of
vicious jaws for
crushing its enemies.

cards.name: Sonic Maid
cards.description:
A maiden
that uses sound
to her advantage.
She wields a scythe
that's shaped
like a musical note.

cards.name: Kurama
cards.description:
A vicious bird that
attacks from the
skies with its
whip-like tail.

cards.name: Legendary Sword
cards.description:
A sword that brings
out the best in
warriors. It cannot
be used by servants
of the dark.

cards.name: Sword of Dark Destruction
cards.description:
Dark forces
increase the power
of Warriors!

cards.name: Dark Energy
cards.description:
Dark forces increase
the power of Fiends
and other monsters
of the Dark!

cards.name: Axe of Despair
cards.description:
Fiends and
Beast-Warriors can
constantly use their
maximum strength!

cards.name: Laser Cannon Armor
cards.description:
Arms Insects with
a powerful laser!

cards.name: Insect Armor with Laser Cannon
cards.description:
Allows Insects to
fire an intense
blast of fire!

cards.name: Elf's Light
cards.description:
Increases the power
of elves with
mystical light!

cards.name: Beast Fangs
cards.description:
Increases the power
of Beasts and other
fanged monsters!

cards.name: Steel Shell
cards.description:
Boosts the power of
shelled monsters!
Said to have no
effect on those
without shells.

cards.name: Vile Germs
cards.description:
Vile microbes boost
the power of Plants
in the woods!

cards.name: Black Pendant
cards.description:
This pendant grants
extra power
to Dark sorcerers!

cards.name: Silver Bow and Arrow
cards.description:
Silver bow and arrow
enhances the power
of Fairies.

cards.name: Horn of Light
cards.description:
Increases the power
of horned creatures!
Has no effect
on Dark monsters.

cards.name: Horn of the Unicorn
cards.description:
Increases the power
of Dark monsters
with horns!

cards.name: Dragon Treasure
cards.description:
A legendary treasure
that increases the
power of dragons.

cards.name: Electro-whip
cards.description:
A whip for
paralyzing enemies.
Increases power when
equipped with
female creatures.

cards.name: Cyber Shield
cards.description:
Increases the power
of female monsters
by changing their
attitudes.

cards.name: Elegant Egotist
cards.description:
Creates two
doppelgangers of
Harpy Lady for
three-pronged
attacks!

cards.name: Mystical Moon
cards.description:
Moonlight increases
the power of Beasts!

cards.name: Stop Defense
cards.description:
Forces an opponent's
monster card
positioned for
defense into the
attack position.

cards.name: Malevolent Nuzzler
cards.description:
Diabolic forces act
to increase the
power of female and
Dark monsters!

cards.name: Violet Crystal
cards.description:
Mystic forces from
the crystal increase
the power of Zombies.

cards.name: Book of Secret Arts
cards.description:
A magic book for
increasing the power
of magic-users.
It cannot be used
by bad-hearted
sorcerers.

cards.name: Invigoration
cards.description:
Increases the power
of Thunder, Rock,
and Pyro monsters.

cards.name: Machine Conversion Factory
cards.description:
A manufacturing
facility that tunes
up all Machine
monsters.

cards.name: Raise Body Heat
cards.description:
Absorbs the sun's
energy to increase
the power of
Dinosaurs!

cards.name: Follow Wind
cards.description:
The winds provide
support to increase
the power of Winged
Beasts and other
flying monsters!

cards.name: Power of Kaishin
cards.description:
Poseidon's Strength
is shared to boost
the power of
Aqua, Fish, and
Sea Serpent
monsters!

cards.name: Dragon Capture Jar
cards.description:
Destroys
all opponent
Dragon monsters
on the playfield!

cards.name: Forest
cards.description:
Changes the field
in favor of
Beast-Warrior,
Insect, Plant, and
Beast monsters!

cards.name: Wasteland
cards.description:
Changes the field
in favor of Zombie,
Dinosaur and
Rock monsters!

cards.name: Mountain
cards.description:
Changes the field
in favor of Dragon,
Winged Beast, and
Thunder monsters!

cards.name: Sogen
cards.description:
Changes the field
to meadow land
in favor of Warrior
and Beast-Warrior
monsters!

cards.name: Umi
cards.description:
Changes the field
in favor of Aqua
and Thunder monsters,
but unfavorable to
Machine and Pyro
monsters!

cards.name: Yami
cards.description:
Changes the field
in favor of
Magic-User and
Fiend monsters,
but unfavorable
to Fairy monsters!

cards.name: Dark Hole
cards.description:
Sucks up every card
in play on the field!

cards.name: Raigeki
cards.description:
Destroys every
opposing monster
with a stroke
of lightning!

cards.name: Mooyan Curry
cards.description:
A delicious
beef curry increases
Life Points by 200!

cards.name: Red Medicine
cards.description:
A magic potion
that increases
Life Points by 500!

cards.name: Goblin's Secret Remedy
cards.description:
A goblin's herb
that increases
Life Points by 1000!

cards.name: Soul of the Pure
cards.description:
A fairy potion
that increases
Life Points by 2000!

cards.name: Dian Keto the Cure Master
cards.description:
A mystical power
that increases
Life Points by 5000!

cards.name: Sparks
cards.description:
A shower of sparks
inflicts 50 points
of damage
to your opponent's
Life Points!!

cards.name: Hinotama
cards.description:
A fireball
inflicts 100 points
of damage
to your opponent's
Life Points!!

cards.name: Final Flame
cards.description:
Flames
inflict 200 points
of damage
to your opponent's
Life Points!!

cards.name: Ookazi
cards.description:
Flames
inflict 500 points
of damage
to your opponent's
Life Points!

cards.name: Tremendous Fire
cards.description:
An inferno
inflicts 1000 points
of damage
to your opponent's
Life Points!

cards.name: Swords of Revealing Light
cards.description:
Enemy monsters
are revealed and
your opponent
cannot attack
for three turns.

cards.name: Spellbinding Circle
cards.description:
A curse reduces the
power of all enemy
monsters!

cards.name: Dark-piercing Light
cards.description:
A dazzling light
reveals all monsters
on the playing field.

cards.name: Yaranzo
cards.description:
A monster that
attacks anybody
who attempts
to open its lid.

cards.name: Kanan the Swordmistress
cards.description:
A lady swordsman
that floats like a
butterfly and stings
like a bee.

cards.name: Takriminos
cards.description:
A finned creature
distantly related
to sea Dragons.

cards.name: Stuffed Animal
cards.description:
A deceptively cute
stuffed animal that
bites.

cards.name: Megasonic Eye
cards.description:
A cryptic doomsday
machine that comes
from the edge of
the universe.

cards.name: Super War-lion
cards.description:
A very vicious lion
with sharp and
long claws.

cards.name: Yamadron
cards.description:
A three-headed,
fire-breathing
monster.

cards.name: Seiyaryu
cards.description:
A sacred dragon
that burns away
wickedness with its
mystical flames.

cards.name: Three-legged Zombies
cards.description:
Bony and Tubby,
a friendly pair
of skeletons.

cards.name: Zera The Mant
cards.description:
A huge, brutal
monster that attacks
with razor-sharp
claws.

cards.name: Flying Penguin
cards.description:
A rare penguin that
flies with the wings
on its head.

cards.name: Millennium Shield
cards.description:
A Millennium Item
candidate
that is said
to block any
powerful attack.

cards.name: Fairy's Gift
cards.description:
Flies around
spreading happiness
to all.

cards.name: Black Luster Soldier
cards.description:
A powerful warrior
with the same
capabilities as the
legendary Blue-eyes
White Dragon.

cards.name: Fiend's Mirror
cards.description:
An arcane glass
that draws
its enemies into
the mirror world.

cards.name: Labyrinth Wall
cards.description:
Walls appear
on the field to form
a labyrinth with
no exit.

cards.name: Jirai Gumo
cards.description:
A monster spider
that dwells
under the earth.

cards.name: Shadow Ghoul
cards.description:
A dangerous zombie
that crawls
in the dark.

cards.name: Wall Shadow
cards.description:
An unusually fast
monster that sweeps
across walls to
attack its enemies.

cards.name: Labyrinth Tank
cards.description:
A tank that races
around a labyrinth
hunting down
its enemies.

cards.name: Sanga of the Thunder
cards.description:
A golem that uses
lightning attacks
similar to the
Labyrinth Brothers.

cards.name: Kazejin
cards.description:
A golem that
controls the winds
like the Labyrinth
Brothers.

cards.name: Suijin
cards.description:
A golem that uses
water attacks like
the Labyrinth
Brothers.

cards.name: Gate Guardian
cards.description:
Sanga, Kazejin, and
Suijin join to
form a single,
powerful monster.

cards.name: Dungeon Worm
cards.description:
Hidden under
the floors of
a labyrinth,
it swallows any
who pass above.

cards.name: Monster Tamer
cards.description:
A master of monsters
that exercises
control over several
creatures.

cards.name: Ryu-kishin Powered
cards.description:
Ryu-kishin enhanced
by the powers of
darkness. Very sharp
talons make it
a worthy opponent.

cards.name: Swordstalker
cards.description:
A monster formed by
the vengeful souls
of those who passed
away in battle.

cards.name: La Jinn the Mystical Genie
cards.description:
A genie of the lamp
that's at the beck
and call of its
master.

cards.name: Blue-eyes Ultimate Dragon
cards.description:
The ultimate dragon
formed by the fusion
of three Blue-eyes
White Dragons.

cards.name: Toon Alligator
cards.description:
An alligator monster
straight from
the cartoons.

cards.name: Rude Kaiser
cards.description:
With an axe in each
hand, this monster
delivers heavy
damage.

cards.name: Parrot Dragon
cards.description:
A dragon from the
cartoons that's more
dangerous than it
appears to be.

cards.name: Dark Rabbit
cards.description:
A cartoon rabbit
that quickly leaps
all over the place,
making it a
difficult target.

cards.name: Bickuribox
cards.description:
A jack-in-the-box
that excels
in surprise attacks.

cards.name: Harpie's Pet Dragon
cards.description:
A favorite pet for
harpies, but a very
dangerous dragon.

cards.name: Mystic Lamp
cards.description:
A lamp
used by wizards
to mix potions.

cards.name: Pendulum Machine
cards.description:
A horrible torture
machine with a large
pendulum blade.

cards.name: Giltia the D. Knight
cards.description:
Armed with a
soul-searing spear,
this creature favors
magic attacks.

cards.name: Launcher Spider
cards.description:
A spider machine
that launches
explosive rockets
against its enemies.

cards.name: Zoa
cards.description:
A monster
whose full potential
can be achieved
when transformed
into its metal form.

cards.name: Metalzoa
cards.description:
A metallic Zoa
capable of
intensive attacks.

cards.name: Zone Eater
cards.description:
A sea creature that
swallows enemies and
slowly digests them.

cards.name: Steel Scorpion
cards.description:
An iron-tailed
monster equipped
with very sharp
scissors.

cards.name: Dancing Elf
cards.description:
An elf that dances
across the sky with
wings of razor-sharp
blades.

cards.name: Ocubeam
cards.description:
Frightening in
appearance, this
creature uses its
large eyes and ears
to keep track
of any movement.

cards.name: Leghul
cards.description:
Not a very powerful
monster despite its
large fangs and
spikes.

cards.name: Ooguchi
cards.description:
A monstrous bullfrog
with poison spikes.

cards.name: Swordsman from a Foreign Land
cards.description:
An eastern warrior
armed with a cursed
sword.

cards.name: Emperor of the Land and Sea
cards.description:
A fire-breathing
reptilian monster.

cards.name: Ushi Oni
cards.description:
A bull monster
resurrected by
the dark arts
that appears
from inside a jar.

cards.name: Monster Eye
cards.description:
A servant that
maintains a close
watch on anything
and everything.
It throws up
a smokescreen
when discovered.

cards.name: Leogun
cards.description:
Huge monster
with a lion's mane
similar to the
"King of Beasts".

cards.name: Tatsunootoshigo
cards.description:
A fast-moving sea
monster that has the
bodies of a horse
and a fish.

cards.name: Saber Slasher
cards.description:
A rampaging machine
that wields
a massive sword.

cards.name: Yaiba Robo
cards.description:
A machine
with several blades
hidden within
its square body.

cards.name: Machine King
cards.description:
Armored with super
alloy, this robot
attacks with blasts
of fire launched
from both arms.

cards.name: Giant Mech-soldier
cards.description:
This monster swings
an earth-shaking axe
that can eliminate
enemies with
a single blow.

cards.name: Metal Dragon
cards.description:
A golden,
fire-breathing
dragon that burns
any opponent
in its path.

cards.name: Mechanical Spider
cards.description:
A spider-shaped,
mechanized monster
with sickles at
the end of its legs.

cards.name: Bat
cards.description:
A mechanized bat
that attacks
by dropping
explosion orbs.

cards.name: Giga-tech Wolf
cards.description:
A wolf made entirely
of iron. Its steel
jaws can bite
through anything.

cards.name: Cyber Soldier
cards.description:
Round-shaped
soldiers that roll
around and act as
guardians to the
Machine King.

cards.name: Shovel Crusher
cards.description:
Armed with
a pair of shovels,
this creature is
a walking engine
of destruction.

cards.name: Mechanicalchacer
cards.description:
A hunter that
relentlessly pursues
its target by order
of the Machine King.

cards.name: Blocker
cards.description:
Each separate part
of this creature is
an individual weapon
capable of
devastating attacks.

cards.name: Blast Juggler
cards.description:
A walking time
device that loves
to blow enemies
away.

cards.name: Golgoil
cards.description:
A massive iron golem
that appears from
a dimensional rift.

cards.name: Giganto
cards.description:
This creature swings
around a huge spiked
ball to destroy its
enemies.

cards.name: Cyber-Stein
cards.description:
Created in a
basement lab, this
infernal machine
launches rockets
from within its
mouth.

cards.name: Cyber Commander
cards.description:
A strike force
equipped with
rader detectors
and sensors.

cards.name: Jinzo #7
cards.description:
Created in an
underground lab,
this artificial
being occasionally
goes berserk.

cards.name: Dice Armadillo
cards.description:
An armadillo-like
creature that forms
a die whenever it
rolls up its body.

cards.name: Sky Dragon
cards.description:
A bird-like dragon
with four bladed
wings.

cards.name: Thunder Dragon
cards.description:
A dragon that
summons thunder and
lightning to attack
its opponents.

cards.name: Stone D.
cards.description:
With a body
consisting entirely
of rocks, 
this dragon
flings boulders
at its enemies.

cards.name: Kaiser Dragon
cards.description:
A very proud and
powerful dragon
emperor.

cards.name: Magician of Faith
cards.description:
Despite its weak
strength, this
creature is capable
of casting spells
to eliminate
darkness.

cards.name: Goddess of Whim
cards.description:
A shy goddess that
seems to spend the
majority of her
time sleeping.

cards.name: Water Magician
cards.description:
This creature
surrounds opponents
with water and
envelops them in a
sweeping attack.

cards.name: Ice Water
cards.description:
A very aggressive
mermaid with spikes
for attacking
enemies.

cards.name: Waterdragon Fairy
cards.description:
A fairy that
wanders the seas.
Rumored to have
the capabilities
for summoning sea
dragons.

cards.name: Ancient Elf
cards.description:
This elf is rumored
to have lived for
thousands of years.
He leads an army of
spirits against his
enemies.

cards.name: Beautiful Beast Trainer
cards.description:
A rare female
magic-user armed
with a vicious whip.

cards.name: Water Girl
cards.description:
A beautiful creature
that flings icy
arrows.

cards.name: White Dolphin
cards.description:
A white, horned
dolphin that attacks
by calling up
tidal waves.

cards.name: Deepsea Shark
cards.description:
A violent shark that
attacks anything
in the sea.

cards.name: Metal Fish
cards.description:
A steel fish
armed with a sharp
dorsal fin.

cards.name: Bottom Dweller
cards.description:
A beautiful swimmer
with a very nasty
temperament.

cards.name: 7 Colored Fish
cards.description:
A rare rainbow fish
that is almost
impossible to catch.

cards.name: Mech Bass
cards.description:
This creature
carries a plasma
cannon on its back.

cards.name: Aqua Dragon
cards.description:
A dragon that dwells
in the sea. It is
capable of spitting
high-pressure blasts
of water.

cards.name: Sea King Dragon
cards.description:
The king of the seas,
this creature is
protected by a solid
shell and spits
poisonous bubbles at
its enemies.

cards.name: Turu-Purun
cards.description:
A strange, one-eyed
monster armed with
a dangerous spear.

cards.name: Guardian of the Sea
cards.description:
A merman warrior
that attacks anyone
who dares to
pollute the sea.

cards.name: Aqua Snake
cards.description:
A creature that
drowns its opponents
by mesmerizing them
with the ball on
the end of its tail.

cards.name: Giant Red Seasnake
cards.description:
A sea serpent
that bites anything
that passes nearby.

cards.name: Spike Seadra
cards.description:
Using the spikes
sprouting from its
body, this creature
stabs its opponents
and floods them
with electricity.

cards.name: 30,000-Year White Turtle
cards.description:
A massive and
well-protected
giant turtle
that has lived
over 30000 years.

cards.name: Kappa Avenger
cards.description:
An amphibian sworn
to avenge the death
of its brothers.

cards.name: Kanikabuto
cards.description:
A crab monster with
two massive scissors
for cutting up
enemies.

cards.name: Zarigun
cards.description:
A newly evolved
crayfish with sharp
scissors for
clipping the enemy.

cards.name: Millennium Golem
cards.description:
A golem
that has protected
treasure for nearly
a millennium.

cards.name: Destroyer Golem
cards.description:
A golem with a
massive right hand
for crushing its
victims.

cards.name: Barrel Rock
cards.description:
A monster that
charges into enemies
firing a pair of
cannons mounted on
its shoulders.

cards.name: Minomushi Warrior
cards.description:
A rock warrior
that wields
a very heavy sword
carved from stone.

cards.name: Stone Ghost
cards.description:
A creature that
erupts with anger,
resulting in a
crushing rain of
boulders.

cards.name: Kaminari Attack
cards.description:
A monster that
judges wrong-doers
and punishes them
appropriately.

cards.name: Tripwire Beast
cards.description:
This creature
attacks enemies
with electromagnetic
waves.

cards.name: Bolt Escargot
cards.description:
This creature spits
a gooey substance
that robs enemies of
mobility and then
stuns them with
electric shocks.

cards.name: Bolt Penguin
cards.description:
A monster
with a pair of
electric whips
instead of arms.

cards.name: The Immortal of Thunder
cards.description:
A creature that
attacks enemies
with thunderbolts.

cards.name: Electric Snake
cards.description:
A serpent with a
tail for storing
electricity.

cards.name: Wing Eagle
cards.description:
A hunter of the
skies that has never
missed a target.

cards.name: Punished Eagle
cards.description:
A judge of the skies
that delivers
a sentence with
its punishing
silver-white claws.

cards.name: Skull Red Bird
cards.description:
This monster
swoops down
and attacks with
a rain of knives
stored in its wings.

cards.name: Crimson Sunbird
cards.description:
A monster burning
with crimson flames
and capable of
delivering a rain of
sparks by flapping
its wings.

cards.name: Queen Bird
cards.description:
A creature that
attacks its enemies
with its large beak.

cards.name: Armed Ninja
cards.description:
A blue ninja
that attacks
with a large sickle
and spiked feet.

cards.name: Magical Ghost
cards.description:
This creature casts
a spell of terror
and confusion just
before attacking
its enemies.

cards.name: Soul Hunter
cards.description:
This clown feeds
the life force of
its enemies to
a monstrous lizard.

cards.name: Air Eater
cards.description:
A monster that
suffocates its
enemy by feeding
on the surrounding
air supply.

cards.name: Vermillion Sparrow
cards.description:
A fiery warrior
creature that
unleashes intense
heat from its body.

cards.name: Sea Kamen
cards.description:
A cruel monster that
slices up enemies
with its sharp claws.

cards.name: Sinister Serpent
cards.description:
A flying poison
snake that is
not very good
at maneuvering
on the ground.

cards.name: Ganigumo
cards.description:
A spider armed with
scissors to attack
anything that
it traps in its web.

cards.name: Alinsection
cards.description:
A stag beetle
monster with
saw-toothed horn
and arms.

cards.name: Insect Soldiers of the Sky
cards.description:
Insect soldiers that
attack in swarms.

cards.name: Cockroach Knight
cards.description:
A cockroach warrior
that hides in small
spaces and emerges
to attack enemies.

cards.name: Kuwagata a
cards.description:
A violent stag
beetle with a 
razor-like cutter.

cards.name: Burglar
cards.description:
A clever mouse
with a sharpened
left claw.

cards.name: Pragtical
cards.description:
A very dangerous
monster with spikes
on its head and tail.

cards.name: Garvas
cards.description:
A malevolent
creature that
resembles a
winged lion.

cards.name: Ameba
cards.description:
A monster
that envelops
an enemy and
slowly digests it.

cards.name: Korogashi
cards.description:
This creature rolls
massive objects
to crush its enemies.

cards.name: Boo Koo
cards.description:
A book wizard
with page after page
of potent spells.

cards.name: Flower Wolf
cards.description:
A beast
covered in flowers
from head to toe.

cards.name: Rainbow Flower
cards.description:
A flower creature
with rainbow-colored
blossoms that lure
an enemy into its
waiting jaws.

cards.name: Barrel Lily
cards.description:
A dangerous flower
that fires pollen
projectiles.

cards.name: Needle Ball
cards.description:
A ball covered in
sharp needles.
Usually rains down
on enemies in a
group.

cards.name: Peacock
cards.description:
A beautiful peacock-
like creature that
fires its feathers
at opponents.

cards.name: Hoshiningen
cards.description:
Trailed by a
beautiful tail, this
shooting star
inflicts damage when
it hits an enemy.

cards.name: Maha Vailo
cards.description:
A wizard dressed in
blue who is usually
found meditating.

cards.name: Rainbow Marine Mermaid
cards.description:
An unusual mermaid
that appears
whenever a rainbow
bridges the sky.

cards.name: Musician King
cards.description:
A fantastic guitar
player that attacks
enemies with
ultrasonic emissions.

cards.name: Wilmee
cards.description:
A ferocious rabbit
with sharp claws.

cards.name: Yado Karu
cards.description:
A hermit crab with
the head of a dragon.

cards.name: Morinphen
cards.description:
A strange fiend
with long arms and
razor-sharp talons.

cards.name: Kattapillar
cards.description:
Attacks by blowing
webs at its enemies.
Nobody knows
what the final form
of this insect
might be.

cards.name: Dragon Seeker
cards.description:
A fearsome monster
sent from the
netherworld
to destroy dragons.

cards.name: Man-eater Bug
cards.description:
A creature that
slices and dices
with its scissors
and feeds off its
victims.

cards.name: D. Human
cards.description:
Gifted with the
power of dragons,
this warrior wields
a sword created
from a dragon's fang.

cards.name: Turtle Raccoon
cards.description:
A fox-like creature
with a protective
shell.

cards.name: Fungi of the Musk
cards.description:
A monster that leaks
acid from its pores
to melt anything
that touches its
skin.

cards.name: Prisman
cards.description:
A clear crystal
that focuses light
to create a powerful
laser beam.

cards.name: Gale Dogra
cards.description:
A huge moth that
generates a
whirlwind containing
poison dust.

cards.name: Crazy Fish
cards.description:
A flying fish
with a sharp head
for piercing targets.

cards.name: Cyber Saurus
cards.description:
A mechanical
dinosaur equipped
with a beam cannon.

cards.name: Bracchio-raidus
cards.description:
A colossal dinosaur
that stomps
on anything
that wanders
into its path.

cards.name: Laughing Flower
cards.description:
A laughing flower
whose chuckles can
drive an enemy mad.

cards.name: Bean Soldier
cards.description:
A plant warrior
that attacks
with a combination
of sword-swings and
pea projectiles.

cards.name: Cannon Soldier
cards.description:
A highly destructive
machine armed with a
powerful cannon.

cards.name: Guardian of the Throne Room
cards.description:
A sentry robot armed
with homing rockets
for guarding throne
rooms from intruders.

cards.name: Brave Scizzar
cards.description:
A creature capable
of manipulating
several scissors
with definite
results.

cards.name: The Statue of Easter Island
cards.description:
A massive stone idol
from Easter Island
that fires laser
rings from its mouth.

cards.name: Muka Muka
cards.description:
A monster that
angers an opponent
to the point that
the enemy goes
berserk.

cards.name: Sand Stone
cards.description:
Appears from
underground and
attacks with long,
snake-like tentacles.

cards.name: Boulder Tortoise
cards.description:
A stone turtle with
a very high defense
factor.

cards.name: Fire Kraken
cards.description:
A fiery squid that
can maintain its
flames underwater.

cards.name: Turtle Bird
cards.description:
A rare flying turtle
that inhabits
the sea.

cards.name: Skullbird
cards.description:
The breath from this
bird robs creatures
of their life force.

cards.name: Monstrous Bird
cards.description:
A huge bird
known for its sharp
dive attacks.

cards.name: The Bistro Butcher
cards.description:
Defeated enemies
serve as ingredients
for this gourmet
monster.

cards.name: Star Boy
cards.description:
An extraterrestrial
life form that loves
living in water.

cards.name: Spirit of the Mountain
cards.description:
Music from this
creature's flute
can drain 
an enemy's willpower.

cards.name: Neck Hunter
cards.description:
Armed with a huge
sickle, this monster
can fire beams
from its large eyes.

cards.name: Milus Radiant
cards.description:
Often mistaken
as a cute pet,
this creature is a
very dangerous beast.

cards.name: Togex
cards.description:
A very fast monster
that rolls up and
rams its enemies.

cards.name: Flame Cerebrus
cards.description:
A flaming beast
that is lethal
to the touch.

cards.name: Eldeen
cards.description:
Uses a wand to cast
various spells
against an enemy.

cards.name: Mystical Sand
cards.description:
Turns enemies to
stone and crushes
them to dust.

cards.name: Gemini Elf
cards.description:
Elf twins
that attack an enemy
from opposite sides.

cards.name: Kwagar Hercules
cards.description:
An insect monster
with the jaws of
a stag beetle and
the horn of a beetle.

cards.name: Minar
cards.description:
A monster with four
highly dexterous
arms for executing
separate attacks.

cards.name: Kamakiriman
cards.description:
A man-shaped mantis
with two razor-sharp
scythes.

cards.name: Mechaleon
cards.description:
A chameleon-like
monster that can
hide anywhere
by changing colors.

cards.name: Mega Thunderball
cards.description:
Rolls along the
ground releasing
bolts of electricity
to attack its
enemies.

cards.name: Niwatori
cards.description:
Swallows enemies
whole and uses
their essence
as energy.

cards.name: Corroding Shark
cards.description:
A zombie shark that
wanders the ocean
depths, cursing any
that dare cross its
path.

cards.name: Skelengel
cards.description:
A phantom fairy that
fires countless
arrows at anything
that harbors an urge
to attack.

cards.name: Hane-Hane
cards.description:
This creature blocks
enemy movement with
gale-force winds
and attacks with
a massive battle axe.

cards.name: Misairuzame
cards.description:
A rocket-launching
fish protected
by thorny spikes.

cards.name: Tongyo
cards.description:
This creature is
powered by the life
force of the fishes
it captures with
its long tongue.

cards.name: Dharma Cannon
cards.description:
A highly accurate
mechanical monster
covered with large-
caliber cannons.

cards.name: Skelgon
cards.description:
A skeletal zombie
dragon that is
capable of flying
across the skies.

cards.name: Wow Warrior
cards.description:
A massive beast
of a fish with
arms, legs, and 
razor-sharp teeth.

cards.name: Griggle
cards.description:
This monster spins
about its enemy
launching blinding
leaves and painful
seeds.

cards.name: Bone Mouse
cards.description:
A zombie rat
that hunts felines.

cards.name: Frog The Jam
cards.description:
A slime creature
with a frog's head
that croaks as it
attacks.

cards.name: Behegon
cards.description:
A strange sea
serpent with a
massive mouth lined
with huge fangs.

cards.name: Dark Elf
cards.description:
A wicked elf
that just loves
to engage in battle.

cards.name: Winged Dragon #2
cards.description:
Creates powerful
tornadoes with
its huge wings.

cards.name: Mushroom Man #2
cards.description:
A fully grown
Mushroom Man with
an increased
attack factor.

cards.name: Lava Battleguard
cards.description:
This brother of
Swamp Battleguard
may not be powerful,
but is pretty good
on defense.

cards.name: Tyhone #2
cards.description:
A crimson dragon
that spits fireballs
at its enemies.

cards.name: The Wandering Doomed
cards.description:
A monster that
aimlessly wanders
in search of enemies.

cards.name: Steel Ogre Grotto #1
cards.description:
A steel idol
worshipped in the
Land of Machines.

cards.name: Pot the Trick
cards.description:
A not very reliable
sorcerer's servant.

cards.name: Oscillo Hero
cards.description:
A strange warrior
from another
dimension.

cards.name: Invader from Another Dimension
cards.description:
A creature that came
from another galaxy.

cards.name: Lesser Dragon
cards.description:
A low-class, minor
dragon incapable
of breathing fire.

cards.name: Needle Worm
cards.description:
A larva
with steel spikes
to attack the unwary.

cards.name: Wretched Ghost of the Attic
cards.description:
A harmless creature
usually found
in the attic
of any home.

cards.name: Great Mammoth of Goldfine
cards.description:
A very unusual
skeletal zombie
elephant with
glowing gold bones.

cards.name: Man-eating Black Shark
cards.description:
A black shark
that can detect
almost any scent
in the water.

cards.name: Yormungarde
cards.description:
A very long snake
that often appears
in legends and myths.

cards.name: Darkworld Thorns
cards.description:
A thorny plant found
in the darklands
that wraps itself
around any unwary
traveler.

cards.name: Anthrosaurus
cards.description:
Man-like dinosaur
lacking in strength,
but with a high I.Q.

cards.name: Drooling Lizard
cards.description:
A blood-sucking
snake in human form
that attacks any
living being that
passes nearby.

cards.name: Trakadon
cards.description:
A tiger-striped
dragon that is often
seen racing across
the wasteland with
tremendous speed.

cards.name: B. Dragon Jungle King
cards.description:
A jet-black dragon
that inhabits the
jungles and feeds
on trees.

cards.name: Empress Judge
cards.description:
Empress of the
Golden Kingdom. None
may refuse her will.

cards.name: Little D
cards.description:
A very ferocious
monster spawned
from a T-Rex.

cards.name: Witch of the Black Forest
cards.description:
This forest-dwelling
witch can see all
with the eye
on her forehead.

cards.name: Ancient One of the Deep Forest
cards.description:
A white goat that
has inhabited the
forest for ages.
The creature is
actually an elder
of the woods.

cards.name: Giant Scorpion of the Tundra
cards.description:
A rare scarlet
scorpion that can be
found in the tundra
-- not in the desert.

cards.name: Crow Goblin
cards.description:
A very wise,
long-nosed goblin
with supernatural
powers.

cards.name: Leo Wizard
cards.description:
A wizard with a
black cape that is
actually a talking
lion disguised
as a man.

cards.name: Abyss Flower
cards.description:
A rare flower
that blooms in a
pitch-dark abyss.

cards.name: Patrol Robo
cards.description:
A cutting-edge robot
that eliminates
intruders upon
detection.

cards.name: Takuhee
cards.description:
This bird is
a precursor
to disaster!!

cards.name: Dark Witch
cards.description:
A popular creature
in mythology that
delivers judgement
with a sharp spear.

cards.name: Weather Report
cards.description:
This creature is
known to predict the
weather with very
little accuracy.

cards.name: Binding Chain
cards.description:
This creature
corners its enemies
and seals away
their power.

cards.name: Mechanical Snail
cards.description:
A mechanically
enhanced snail that
is no faster than
it used to be.

cards.name: Greenkappa
cards.description:
A creature that
transforms into the
image of its enemy
and copies every
offensive move.

cards.name: Mon Larvas
cards.description:
A highly evolved
Larvas that is even
more powerful than
before.

cards.name: Living Vase
cards.description:
A living vase that
blinds enemies with
pollen and attacks
with its sharp teeth.

cards.name: Tentacle Plant
cards.description:
Attacks a nearby
opponent by reaching
out with its blue
vines.

cards.name: Beaked Snake
cards.description:
Wraps its coils
around opponents and
pecks them with its
huge beak.

cards.name: Morphing Jar
cards.description:
A large jar
that attacks
nearby enemies
by unleashing
the monster
it contains inside.

cards.name: Muse-A
cards.description:
A fairy of the arts
and an excellent
harp player.

cards.name: Giant Turtle Who Feeds on Flames
cards.description:
A monster turtle
with a crimson shell.
It feeds on fire.

cards.name: Rose Spectre of Dunn
cards.description:
A red rose possessed
by a vile spirit
that feeds on
the life force
of others to
provide the flower
with nourishment.

cards.name: Fiend Refrection #1
cards.description:
Drags enemies into
a mirror world.

cards.name: Ghoul with an Appetite
cards.description:
A monster that can
eat all it wants but
is never fulfilled.

cards.name: Pale Beast
cards.description:
With skin tinged
a bluish white, this
strange creature is
a fearsome sight
to behold.

cards.name: Little Chimera
cards.description:
A monster created
from an experimental
attempt to graft
wings on beasts.

cards.name: Violent Rain
cards.description:
A monster capable of
bringing on sudden
rain showers.

cards.name: Key Mace #2
cards.description:
Seals away the good
in a soul to create
a wicked being.

cards.name: Tenderness
cards.description:
A cute fairy
dedicated
to bringing
about eternal love.

cards.name: Penguin Soldier
cards.description:
A low-class penguin
soldier that attacks
in a group.

cards.name: Fairy Dragon
cards.description:
A beautiful
and powerful
dragon fairy.

cards.name: Obese Marmot of Nefariousness
cards.description:
An ill-mannered
field mouse that
chews on anything.

cards.name: Liquid Beast
cards.description:
A liquid life form
that moves freely
in water.

cards.name: Twin Long Rods #2
cards.description:
An undersea creature
that attacks with
two whip-like tails.

cards.name: Great Bill
cards.description:
A monster with a
massive maw that
allows it to swallow
an enemy whole.

cards.name: Shining Friendship
cards.description:
The peacemaker
among monsters.

cards.name: Bladefly
cards.description:
A monster fly
that swoops down
with sharp
sword-like arms
extended out front.

cards.name: Electric Lizard
cards.description:
A lizard
that discharges
electricity stored
in its body.

cards.name: Hiro's Shadow Scout
cards.description:
A servant of fiends
used primarily for
scouting an area.

cards.name: Lady of Faith
cards.description:
Soothes the souls of
others by chanting
a mysterious spell.

cards.name: Twin-headed Thunder Dragon
cards.description:
A two-headed Thunder
Dragon capable of
powerful electric
attacks.

cards.name: Hunter Spider
cards.description:
A hunter that uses
its spider web to
entrap its enemies.

cards.name: Armored Starfish
cards.description:
A bluish starfish
with a solid hide
capable of fending
off attacks.

cards.name: Hourglass of Courage
cards.description:
A fairy that
controls the
feelings of others,
instilling them
with bravery.

cards.name: Marine Beast
cards.description:
A sea creature
with sharp teeth
that won't release
a victim once
they're locked on.

cards.name: Warrior of Tradition
cards.description:
A lady warrior
drenched in the 
essence from
a thousand
battlefields.

cards.name: Rock Spirit
cards.description:
A clay idol
representing a rock
spirit. The creature
has significant
attack and defense
factors.

cards.name: Snakeyashi
cards.description:
A creature made up
of several snakes
that attack
separately in battle.

cards.name: Succubus Knight
cards.description:
A vile
warrior wizard
adept at casting
doom-dealing spells.

cards.name: Ill Witch
cards.description:
Controls air
currents and
can generate
a sudden gust
of wind to blow
away an opponent.

cards.name: The Thing That Hides in the Mud
cards.description:
The appearance
of this creature
is preceded by the
ground melting under
an opponent's feet.

cards.name: High Tide Gyojin
cards.description:
An amphibian warrior
that can easily
navigate beneath
the waters.

cards.name: Fairy of the Fountain
cards.description:
A fairy dedicated to
protecting fountains
from pollution.

cards.name: Amazon of the Seas
cards.description:
A mermaid sentry
serving the Sea King
and his kingdom.

cards.name: Nekogal #2
cards.description:
This fast creature
can easily elude
enemy attacks and
counter them with
its vicious claws.

cards.name: Witch's Apprentice
cards.description:
An inexperienced
witch who just
started learning
the mystic arts.

cards.name: Armored Rat
cards.description:
A rat
that is protected
by armor-like fur.

cards.name: Ancient Lizard Warrior
cards.description:
A powerful,
prehistoric
lizard warrior.

cards.name: Maiden of the Moonlight
cards.description:
A lunar sorcerer
that uses mystical
spells to induce
hallucinations.

cards.name: Stone Ogre Grotto
cards.description:
A rock giant
consisting of
massive boulders.

cards.name: Winged Egg of New Life
cards.description:
A messenger of
newborn life.

cards.name: Night Lizard
cards.description:
A green-scaled
lizard warrior
dedicated to 
protecting the sea.

cards.name: Queen's Double
cards.description:
Not very useful
double of a queen.

cards.name: Blue-winged Crown
cards.description:
A bird that glows
with blue flames and
has a head of hair
shaped like a crown.

cards.name: Trent
cards.description:
A protector
of the forest,
this massive tree
continues to grow.

cards.name: Queen of Autumn Leaves
cards.description:
Queen of the
Tree Spirit
who is embraced
by brilliant
autumn leaves.

cards.name: Amphibious Bugroth
cards.description:
A Bugroth unit
modified for
underwater warfare.

cards.name: Acid Crawler
cards.description:
A gigantic
caterpillar that
spits acid capable
of melting
almost anything.

cards.name: Invader of the Throne
cards.description:
A scheming queen
who covets
the king's throne
during his absence.

cards.name: Mystical Sheep #1
cards.description:
A black-haired sheep
that is capable
of sorcery.

cards.name: Disk Magician
cards.description:
A creature that
hides in a saucer
and appears only to
attack enemies.

cards.name: Flame Viper
cards.description:
A very swift,
fire-breathing viper.

cards.name: Royal Guard
cards.description:
Mechanical soldier
with a mind
of its own.
Originally created
to protect members
of the royal family.

cards.name: Gruesome Goo
cards.description:
Looks like any other
slime,
but definitely
much more powerful!

cards.name: Hyosube
cards.description:
This amphibian
creature boasts
a high attack factor,
but not much of one
for defense.

cards.name: Machine Attacker
cards.description:
A machine designed
to blitz its enemies.

cards.name: Hibikime
cards.description:
Confuses enemy
monsters with noise
that is harsh
to the ears.

cards.name: Whiptail Crow
cards.description:
Attacks from the
skies with
a whip-like tail.

cards.name: Kunai with Chain
cards.description:
A boomerang
featuring the
effects of two
cards: the Legendary
Sword and the Sword
of Dark Destruction.

cards.name: Magical Labyrinth
cards.description:
A card for boosting
the power of the
Labyrinth Wall.

cards.name: Warrior Elimination
cards.description:
Destroys all
opponent Warrior
cards played
on the field.

cards.name: Salamandra
cards.description:
Increases the
strength of those
who control the
power of Salamandra.

cards.name: Cursebreaker
cards.description:
Cancels the magic
over all 
level-reduced
monsters and sets
them at level 0.

cards.name: Eternal Rest
cards.description:
Eliminates all
Zombie creatures.

cards.name: Megamorph
cards.description:
A card that
increases the power
of any selected
monster by 2 levels.

cards.name: Metalmorph
cards.description:
A card that changes
any selected monster
to a Machine monster.

cards.name: Winged Trumpeter
cards.description:
A horn that
increases the power
of Fairy creatures.

cards.name: Stain Storm
cards.description:
Acid rain destroys
an opponent's
Machine monsters.

cards.name: Crush Card
cards.description:
Opponent monsters
in play with attack
factors of 1500 or
more are eliminated.

cards.name: Eradicating Aerosol
cards.description:
An insecticide for
wiping out an
opponent's Insect
monsters that are
currently in play.

cards.name: Breath of Light
cards.description:
A magic wind that
reduces to rubble an
opponent's Rock
monsters that are
currently in play.

cards.name: Eternal Draught
cards.description:
A blast of heat
dries up
and eliminates
an opponent's Fish
monsters that are
currently in play.

cards.name: Curse of Millennium Shield
cards.description:
Sacrifices the
monster with the
highest defense 
rating and summons
Shield.

cards.name: Yamadron Ritual
cards.description:
Sacrifices
Beast-Warrior,
Dragon,
and Pyro monsters
to summon Yamadron.

cards.name: Gate Guardian Ritual
cards.description:
Sacrifices Kazejin,
Suijin, and Sanga of
the Thunder to
summon Gate Guardian.

cards.name: Bright Castle
cards.description:
A glaring light that
increases the power
of all monsters.

cards.name: Shadow Spell
cards.description:
Decreases an
opponent's in-play
monsters by two
levels.

cards.name: Black Luster Ritual
cards.description:
Ceremony conducted
to summon
Black Luster Soldier.
Sacrifice required.

cards.name: Zera Ritual
cards.description:
Ceremony conducted
to summon Zera.
Sacrifice required.
