cards.name: Harpie's Feather Duster
cards.description:
Destroys all
opponent Magic cards
that are in play.

cards.name: War-lion Ritual
cards.description:
Ceremony conducted
to summon War Lion.
Sacrifice required.

cards.name: Beastry Mirror Ritual
cards.description:
Ceremony conducted
to summon
Fiend's Mirror.
Sacrifice required.

cards.name: Ultimate Dragon
cards.description:
Sacrifice three
Blue-eyes to summon
Ultimate Dragon.

cards.name: Commencement Dance
cards.description:
Sacrifice Dancer and
Warrior to summon
Performance of Sword.

cards.name: Hamburger Recipe
cards.description:
A card with
the ingredients
for making a
delicious hamburger.

cards.name: Revival of Sennen Genjin
cards.description:
Sacrifice
Beast-Warrior and
Golem to summon
Sengenjin.

cards.name: Novox's Prayer
cards.description:
Sacrifice Warrior
and Scythe Wielder
to summon
Skull Guardian.

cards.name: Curse of Tri-Horned Dragon
cards.description:
Sacrifice a horned
monster to summon
Tri-Horned Dragon.

cards.name: House of Adhesive Tape
cards.description:
Monsters
with Attack Factors
of 500 or lower
are eliminated
from the play field.

cards.name: Eatgaboon
cards.description:
Monsters
with Attack Factors
of 1000 or lower
are eliminated
from the play field.

cards.name: Bear Trap
cards.description:
When an opposing
monster's Attack
Factor is
1500 or lower,
it is eliminated
from the play field.

cards.name: Invisible Wire
cards.description:
When an opposing
monster's Attack
Factor is
2000 or lower,
it is eliminated
from the play field.

cards.name: Acid Trap Hole
cards.description:
When an opposing
monster's Attack
Factor is
3000 or lower,
it is eliminated
from the play field.

cards.name: Widespread Ruin
cards.description:
When an opponent's
monster attacks,
it is blown to
smithereens and
eliminated from
the play field.

cards.name: Goblin Fan
cards.description:
Reflects the damage
of direct attack
cards like 
Fire Sparks and
Inferno back
to your opponent.

cards.name: Bad Reaction to Simochi
cards.description:
A card that reverses
the effects of
recovery cards and
transforms the
points to damage.

cards.name: Reverse Trap
cards.description:
A card that reverses
the effects of
power-up cards
and transforms 
the effects
to power reduction.

cards.name: Fake Trap
cards.description:
A trap card
for tricking
your opponent.
Nothing happens
when it is attacked.

cards.name: Revived of Serpent Night Dragon
cards.description:
Select a specific
monster for
sacrifice and summon
Serpent Night Dragon.

cards.name: Turtle Oath
cards.description:
Sacrifice crab and
turtle to summon
Crab Turtle.

cards.name: Contruct of Mask
cards.description:
Sacrifice a masked
one to summon a new
mask.

cards.name: Resurrection of Chakra
cards.description:
Sacrifice 3 Fiend
monsters to conduct
the ritual for the
Resurrection of
Chakra.

cards.name: Puppet Ritual
cards.description:
Sacrifice Puppeteer
and Machine monsters
to summon the Puppet.

cards.name: Javelin Beetle Pact
cards.description:
Sacrifice the stag
beetle and beetle
to summon
Javelin Beetle.

cards.name: Garma Sword Oath
cards.description:
Sacrifice the
Ashura's Arm
and Sword-wielder
to summon.

cards.name: Cosmo Queen's Prayer
cards.description:
Sacrifice a normal
Queen to summon
Cosmo Queen.

cards.name: Revival of Skeleton Rider
cards.description:
Sacrifice Temple and
Cockroach to summon
Dokurorider.

cards.name: Fortress Whale's Oath
cards.description:
Sacrifice Horn and
Machine Fish to
summon Sea Fortress.

cards.name: Performance of Sword
cards.description:
A warrior dancer
with fancy dance
steps.

cards.name: Hungry Burger
cards.description:
Attracts hungry
enemies with tasty
aromas and eats them
when they get close
enough.

cards.name: Sengenjin
cards.description:
A headstrong,
primitive man
equipped with 
a Millennium Item.

cards.name: Skull Guardian
cards.description:
A guardian of the
law that doesn't
forgive cheating.
Attacks enemies with
its sword-like arms.

cards.name: Tri-horned Dragon
cards.description:
A wicked dragon
with three horns
protruding from
its head.

cards.name: Serpent Night Dragon
cards.description:
A dragon created
from the soul
of a wicked knight.

cards.name: Skull Knight
cards.description:
A monk
who has conducted
several rituals
in the netherworld,
and who is capable
of using both
weapons and magic.

cards.name: Cosmo Queen
cards.description:
A queen who rules
over all the stars
in the universe.

cards.name: Chakra
cards.description:
A twisting shape
that attacks with
tentacle-like arms.

cards.name: Crab Turtle
cards.description:
A creature with a
turtle shell and
crab scissors to
provide high attack
and defense factors.

cards.name: Mikazukinoyaiba
cards.description:
A dragon warrior
armed with a
crescent-shaped
sword. Rumored to be
from the moon.

cards.name: Meteor Dragon
cards.description:
A dragon that
arrived on earth
by means of a comet
that fell from
the far reaches
of space.

cards.name: Meteor B. Dragon
cards.description:
With the burning
hide of a meteorite,
this creature
vaporizes all that
it touches.

cards.name: Firewing Pegasus
cards.description:
A heavenly stallion
that flies
across the skies
on scarlet wings.

cards.name: Psycho-Puppet
cards.description:
A mysterious doll
with a strange dance
that robs the power
of opposing monsters.

cards.name: Garma Sword
cards.description:
A skilled warrior
that wields six
swords against
opposing monsters.

cards.name: Javelin Beetle
cards.description:
A creature with
lethal scissors that
cut through almost
anything.

cards.name: Fortress Whale
cards.description:
A sea monster with
a cannon mounted on
its back to blow
its enemies out
of the water.

cards.name: Dokurorider
cards.description:
A lonely rider that
races across the
wasteland, raising
thick clouds of dust.

cards.name: Mask of Shine & Dark
cards.description:
A creature that
twists the fabric of
light and darkness
to generate images
to confuse opponents.

cards.name: Dark Magic Ritual
cards.description:
Ceremony
for summoning
the Magician of
Black Chaos.
Sacrifice required.

cards.name: Magician of Black Chaos
cards.description:
The ultimate
magic-user,
who wields the power
of chaos borne from
the fusion of
Dark and Light.
